goal: 发布 Sherlog 并更新本地 CLI 与 skill

summary.title: Release Sherlog 0.3.16
summary.what: Bumped @act0r/sherlog from 0.3.15 to 0.3.16 in package.json and package-lock.json, committed the release bump, pushed main, and pushed tag v0.3.16 to trigger the npm release workflow.
summary.why: The #82 memory review stack and #85 coverage status changes were merged to main and needed to be published so the installed shlog CLI can consume them.
summary.user_goal: 发布 Sherlog 并更新本地 CLI 与 skill

decisions.chose: Use the existing tag-triggered GitHub Actions release workflow by pushing v0.3.16.
decisions.rationale: The repository release workflow runs npm ci, npm run check, and npm publish with the configured NPM_TOKEN, matching prior project release practice.
rejected: Publishing manually from the local checkout

decisions.chose: Publish 0.3.16 as the next patch after 0.3.15.
decisions.rationale: The merged changes are compatible CLI/status/eval improvements and npm registry still reported 0.3.15 before release.

review_notes: Local validation before commit: npm run check passed with 32 test files and 215 tests; npm run build completed successfully.
GitHub Actions release run 28415538989 completed successfully and npm view @act0r/sherlog version returned 0.3.16.
Archive.zip remained an unrelated untracked local file and was not committed.

behavioral_changes: Published the merged Sherlog main branch as @act0r/sherlog 0.3.16 via the tag release workflow.
